name: com.datadoe/amazon-seller-mcp
title: DataDoe MCP
description: Hosted Amazon Seller and Vendor MCP server for Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, Codex, Gemini, and GitHub Copilot. Live Amazon SP-API and Amazon Ads API data exposed through MCP tools (orders, sales, ads, inventory, listings, catalog, finance, traffic), with DataDoe handling SP-API developer registration, OAuth, and rate limits.

headers.name: datadoe-mcp-key
headers.description: DataDoe MCP API key. Create one at https://app.datadoe.com/integrations/mcp
